# Third-Party Libraries

The following open-source libraries are bundled with Superior e-Pub Viewer.

## epub.js v0.3.93 (patched)

- **License:** MIT
- **Author:** Fred Chasen / Future Press
- **Source:** https://github.com/futurepress/epub.js
- **Modifications:** Patched `Stage.size()` to fix CSS width/height parsing errors in Firefox
